menu.welcome:
Welcome, {{firstName}}!

To interact with this bot use keys below,
or commands (commands list /help).

timetable.error:
вқҢRequest for date: {{date}}

Too far from today's date! The server did not return any result! To get today's timetable use /timetable.

week.unavailable: Week view is not available now!

untis_data.head: рҹ‘Ө*Untis profile:*
untis_data.invalid:
Data is not valid.
Your data will be deleted from channel and DB, so you need to provide us new valid data.

errors.ChangeData:
вӣ”пёҸ*Your data is not valid!*
Return to menu and try again.
errors.login:
вӣ”пёҸ*Failed to login!*
Your data will be deleted from channel and DB, so you need to provide us new valid data.

general.editDataFirst: Please finish editing the data before using other functions.
general.nocommand: Command not found. If you were trying to use the AI вҖ” you have reached your message limit (20). It will reset 24 hours after your last AI message.

notifications.substit:
*в„№пёҸ Your lesson on {lesson.date} from {lesson.startTime} to {lesson.endTime} has been substituted with:*

рҹ“” {lesson.subjects[0].fullName} ({lesson.subjects[0].shortName})
рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹҸ« {data}
рҹ”ў {lesson.rooms[0].fullName} ({lesson.rooms[0].shortName})
notifications.tesubstit:
*в„№пёҸ Your lesson on {lesson.date} from {lesson.startTime} to {lesson.endTime} has a substituted teacher:*

рҹ“” {lesson.subjects[0].fullName} ({lesson.subjects[0].shortName})
рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹҸ« {data}
рҹ”ў {lesson.rooms[0].fullName} ({lesson.rooms[0].shortName})
notifications.canceled:
*в„№пёҸ Your lesson on {lesson.date} from {lesson.startTime} to {lesson.endTime} has been canceled:*

рҹ“” {lesson.subjects[0].fullName} ({lesson.subjects[0].shortName})
рҹ§‘вҖҚрҹҸ« {data}
рҹ”ў {lesson.rooms[0].fullName} ({lesson.rooms[0].shortName})
notifications.noChanges: No substitutions or cancellations today. рҹҢһ
